content: Tom drives with a raw onion beside him when he's been drinking, because a doctor once told him that, if he chewed and swallowed raw onion just before being breathalyzed, it would mask the alcohol on his breath.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by patgfisher (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Tom guida con una cipolla cruda accanto a lui quando ha bevuto, perché una volta un dottore gli ha detto che, se avesse
